summary: An AI coworker that lives in your Slack to get work done Discussion | Link
content: Yasmine is an AI coworker that lives in your Slack. Each channel becomes a teammate with its own memory, its tools and integrations. Connect your tools and mention it to get real work done — email, docs, data, code, anything. It runs on your own Claude subscription, fully isolated. By Yasmine
